message:
feat(security,pty,doctor): path traversal hardening, symlink escape prevention, bounded thread joins, PTY input write safety, signal exit code preservation

Path traversal and symlink escape hardening:
- New join_validated_child_path() and ensure_safe_path_component()
  utilities reject ../-style traversals in user-supplied run_name,
  slug, and similar fields across capture, corpus, import modules
- copy_tree_snapshot_materialized() replaces multiple ad-hoc copy_tree
  implementations with a single canonicalization-based copier that
  detects symlink escapes and cycles, refusing to follow symlinks that
  resolve outside the source root
- Sandbox enforcer now resolves symlinks before checking read/write
  allow/deny lists, preventing symlink-based policy bypass

Anti-deadlock / thread-safety hardening:
- All unbounded thread::join() calls replaced with bounded
  poll-with-timeout variants (typically 250ms) with
  detach-to-background-thread fallback for VHS log pumps, seed demo
  threads, clipboard external commands, live writer access, tracing
  console access
- Condvar::wait calls in live.rs and logging.rs converted to
  wait_timeout to prevent indefinite blocking when a writer stalls

PTY input write safety:
- New PtyInputWriter actor thread with write_with_timeout() replaces
  direct writer.write_all() calls in PtySession and PtyProcess
- Writes that time out kill the child process
- New send_line()/write_line() API normalizes line endings to \r\n
  for interactive shells

Signal exit code preservation:
- New exit_status_code() utility maps signal-terminated processes to
  128 + signal (shell convention) instead of previous unwrap_or(1)
- ProcessState::Signaled variant added to process_subscription.rs and
  pty_process.rs for proper signal-vs-exit discrimination

RunMeta path sanitization:
- normalize_loaded_run_meta_paths() rewrites all artifact paths in
  deserialized RunMeta to be scoped under the discovered run directory,
  preventing forged run_dir or ../-escaped artifact paths
- Applied in doctor.rs, report.rs, and suite.rs

Git clone cleanup:
- acquire_from_git() and intake_git_source() now guarantee clone
  directory cleanup via RAII-style closure wrappers even on failure

Includes ~40 new test functions covering security, timeout, and signal
behaviors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
